compliance-ignores.reason: The server embeds seed.sql via include_str!; the foundation cross helper drops it (it re-filters through crane's cleanCargoSource), so the Windows PE cannot build. A hosted Linux service also ships no Windows binary. Interim opt-out under Option B; revert once the foundation preserves embedded sources. See docs/template-compliance-plan.org.

Same cause as flake-windows-x86-package: the embedded seed.sql is dropped by the foundation cross helper, and this Linux service ships no Windows binary. Interim opt-out; revert with the foundation fix. See docs/template-compliance-plan.org.

The flake does not wire the Windows cross build (see the two flake-windows checks above), so CONTRIBUTING.org does not document Windows binaries it never produces. Revert alongside the Windows package opt-outs once the foundation fix lands. See docs/template-compliance-plan.org.
